positive: A vibrant, stylized jungle cat silhouette, crouching in anticipation. The cat is framed against a dense, intricate tapestry of abstract tropical leaves and swirling geometric patterns. Use bold, saturated jewel tones—emerald green, sapphire blue, and deep magenta—with stark black and white accents for high contrast. The composition must feature the cat prominently and centrally, with the foliage providing an elaborate, repeating background texture suitable for all-over print on apparel. Clean lines, graphic novel aesthetic, highly stylized, perfect symmetry, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photo, monochrome, grayscale, low contrast, gradient wash
